scripts.preinstall: node -e "const fs = require('node:fs'); const ua = process.env.npm_config_user_agent ?? ''; const execPath = (process.env.npm_execpath ?? process.env.npm_node_execpath ?? '').toLowerCase(); const isPnpm = ua.startsWith('pnpm/') || execPath.includes('pnpm'); if (!isPnpm) { console.warn('Use pnpm instead'); } for (const file of ['package-lock.json', 'yarn.lock']) { if (fs.existsSync(file)) fs.rmSync(file, { force: true }); }"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
